title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Tuv Rheinland Ireland Limited
body: "Application number 5209  Applicant Tuv Rheinland UK Limited objected to the name used by Tuv Rheinland Ireland Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Tuv Rheinland Ireland Limited is changed to 15804116, Ltd. "
